title: gentiana verna subsp. elongata
intro: Gentiana verna subsp. elongata, also known as the spring gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, characterized by its tall, slender stems and vibrant blue or purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentiana verna subsp. elongata include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
